summary: Field trip formatting, PDF download, history tracking, Turnstile fix
changes: Field trip results now render as clean labeled cards with no markdown symbols
Download as PDF button saves field trip results as a file
Field trips saved to account history automatically after each search
Field trip history section added to account page with Search Again links
Fixed Turnstile widget using wrong keys (Tap Caps keys replaced with Unbound Learner keys)
Turnstile token now auto-resets on expiry so users re-verify before submitting

summary: Quiz Generator with interactive scoring and printable PDFs
changes: Quiz Generator: generate quizzes from any lesson plan
5 question types: multiple choice, true/false, fill in the blank, matching, extended response
Interactive on-screen scoring with results summary
Printable student quiz and answer key PDFs
Make a Quiz button on plan pages and account history

summary: Fix account page showing raw grade number (e.g. "4") — now displays as "Grade 4".

Fix Planner adding unsolicited subjects (SEL, Science Connection etc.) when parent specifies specific subjects — now strictly respects subjectGoals selection. Fix outline regeneration to redirect to scribe waiting screen instead of spinning in place on the outline page.

Fix upgrade banner showing for active subscribers — profile page now checks subscription_status before displaying plans_used banner. Subscribers never see the upgrade prompt regardless of plans_used count.

Fix 13-minute hang: Vercel hard-kill leaves KV stale — frontend now hard-times out at 6 minutes and shows error state. Failure email sent to notify-opted users if generation errors or times out. Root cause: Vercel kills function at maxDuration without running catch block; 2min per-call timeout (v0.3.7) + 6min frontend timeout are the two-layer defense.

Add 2-minute per-call timeout to all Claude API calls — prevents hung requests from burning tokens indefinitely. Add "Taking longer than expected" UI on generating page after 4 minutes with a Start Over link.

Fix outline flash on generating page — stale outline_ready status ignored when waiting for full plan. Remove Download PDF button from account page (was producing unformatted HTML file); users can download properly formatted PDFs from the plan page.

Fix empty account/plan history page — Supabase upsert now works correctly once unique constraint on kv_session_id is applied. Fix brief flash of outline messaging when transitioning from outline to full plan generation page.
Feedback now shows submitter email in admin panel, notification email to Nicole, and CSV export. Admin feedback tab joins unbound_users to display email alongside each submission.

Account page with full plan history (view + download past plans). Plan content now persisted to Supabase — no more 24h expiry. Email notification opt-in during generation — get emailed when your plan is ready with a direct link. Nav My Plans link added. All 7 security fixes from Sentinel/QA review applied.

Account page with full plan history (view + download past plans). Plan content now persisted to Supabase (no more 24h expiry). Email notification opt-in during generation — get emailed when your plan is ready with a direct link.
Fix feedback submission 403 error — planId is a KV session ID not a Supabase UUID; ownership enforced via user_id on insert instead. KV credentials fixed in Vercel production and Doppler.
Security cleanup: subject length cap (200 chars) added to /api/field-trips to prevent prompt bloat. Added RESEND_API_KEY to .env.local.example for local dev setup.
Field Trip Finder, 2e positioning, state standards + subject goals on plan form
changes: New Field Trip Finder page (/field-trips) — subject + zip code + radius → Claude-powered suggestions
Updated positioning to neurodivergent and gifted (2e) learners throughout site
State standards toggle on plan form — select state, align lessons to academic standards
Subject goals section — specify up to 4 subjects with specific focus per session
Fixed Turnstile widget (site key was missing from Doppler)
Resend API key added — Nicole now receives email on every feedback submission

summary: Version history tab added to admin dashboard. Changelog tracked in lib/changelog.json, auto-displayed in admin panel newest-first.

Security hardening (Sentinel findings): plan ownership verification on feedback submit, spam prevention via unique constraint per user/plan, server-side comment length validation, CSV injection protection in admin export, HTML escaping in email notifications.

Early adopter feedback capture: thumbs up/down widget on plan page, feedback stored in Supabase (unbound_feedback table), Resend email notification to Nicole on each submission, admin Feedback tab with positive ratio stats and CSV export.

Sentinel-verified security hardening: Next.js middleware enforcing auth on protected routes, Turnstile server-side verification on all forms, IDOR fail-closed ownership checks, atomic KV NX set pattern for free plan race condition, ADMIN_EMAILS centralized in lib/config.ts, /api/admin/init-db gated behind admin check, security headers added.

Domain switch to unboundlearner.com. GA4 (G-SEGN8M15H2) added. Dedicated Supabase project (lbtozmvkcksiiayuchse) provisioned. All secrets migrated to Doppler unbound project. Supabase Site URL updated.

Auth and user management: Supabase signup/login/password reset/email confirm flows, free first plan enforcement, $9 charge for plan 2+, session expired error handling fixed, payment flow fixed. Admin dashboard at /admin/ub-manage-2026 with user and plan management.

Nicole E2E feedback: materials section added to plan output, state standards paste-in field on profile form, sagacious scribe wait screen with character animation during generation, two separate PDFs (teacher guide + student packet), daily inspirational quote at top of each plan.

Privacy and compliance: privacy policy page at /privacy, consent checkbox on profile form, footer link added. Neurodivergent language removed from landing page meta description and all 7 agent prompts. Sage reframed as learning specialist.

Profile form redesign: diagnosis and age fields removed entirely; nickname + grade level dropdown only. Generic homeschool positioning replacing neurodivergent framing. PII reduction in Vercel KV (24h TTL, nickname + plan content only). Stripe separate account with restricted API keys scoped to Payment Intents and Checkout Sessions.

Cloudflare Turnstile bot protection added to all forms. unboundlearner.com and unbound-lake.vercel.app added as allowed domains. Stripe webhook verification added. Feedback field 500-char cap. Error handler body re-read fix.

Initial launch: two-phase plan generation (outline ~15s + full plan ~75s), 7-specialist multi-agent team (Sage, Euler, Darwin, Paige, Atlas, Grounded, Studio), Stripe payments, Supabase auth, free first plan, profile form, privacy policy, GA4 analytics.
